cta_desc: If you are a university, council, government body, charity, or corporate partner looking to help people start businesses — we should talk.
problem_p1: All over the UK, people want to start a business. They are smart. They work hard. They have good ideas. Some have degrees. Some have years of experience. They all believe they could build something.
problem_heading: People keep getting stuck before they start.
problem_p2: But most of them never start. They read books. They watch videos. They take courses. Then they go back to their normal life and nothing changes. They keep going back and forth between feeling excited and doing nothing.
problem_p3: They do not need more information. They need a step-by-step plan and someone to hold them to it.
method_heading: We build businesses, not just knowledge.
impact_heading: We go where the need is greatest.
callout_quote: "The fear of losing money, wasting time, and having to tell people it did not work out keeps them stuck."
card3_desc: You build your actual business inside the programme. You test your offer. You get your first clients. You make money. The goal is a running business, not a business plan.
card2_desc: Daily check-ins, tracked progress, live sessions, and honest feedback. Our programmes are made for busy people. The work happens in short, focused bursts — not endless study.
card1_desc: We cover what matters: Mindset, Offers, Sales, Marketing, and Operations. Every session ends with something you can use right away — not just notes to look at later.
method_desc: We found seven things that stop first-time founders from getting their first paying client. Every programme we run is built to fix each one.
stat1_label: Of new businesses fail within 3 years
cta_heading: Want to bring this to your community?
stat2_label: People in the UK thinking about starting
stat4_label: What traditional education charges to help them
individuals_desc: We meet you where you are. Whether you want to learn at your own pace, build with a coach by your side, or have us do it for you — there is a programme for every stage.
organisations_desc: We partner with institutions to deliver enterprise education and self-employment support to the communities they serve. Our programmes are designed for people at the earliest stages of business formation.
impact_p1: We built Mind and Method Academy for the people that most business education ignores: people starting from scratch. People without money, without connections, without anyone in their life who has done it before.
hero_sub: Most people who want to start a business never do. They have the ideas. They have the drive. What they lack is a clear plan and someone to keep them on track. That is what we provide.
impact_p2: Our founder has run workshops in universities, community centres, schools, and prisons across three continents. Every programme is built around reality — people who are busy, who are careful with money, and who need a clear path they can follow in short bursts.
impact_p3: We measure success one way: did they build a business? Everything else is secondary.
